title: Consistent clinical-standard cleaning for a Hunter Valley childcare centre
excerpt: A growing childcare centre was cycling through cleaning contractors every few months. Poor consistency, wrong products, and zero accountability. We fixed it.
challenge: The centre had used three different commercial cleaning contractors over 18 months. Each one started well and deteriorated. Staff were spending time re-cleaning areas before opening. A regulatory inspection had flagged cleanliness as a concern. The director needed a cleaner they didn't have to think about — one that showed up, did it properly, and stayed.
solution: Sarah Kelley conducted a full site assessment to understand the specific cleaning requirements — play areas, cot rooms, bathrooms, kitchen, entry zones. We developed a written cleaning protocol specific to the centre using child-safe, non-toxic products approved for childcare environments. A dedicated two-person team was assigned to the site. Monthly quality audits were built into the contract from day one.
outcome: The centre has had the same cleaning team for over 12 months. Zero regulatory concerns at the next inspection. Staff no longer re-clean before opening. The director has a direct line to Sarah and has used it twice — both resolved same day.

quote.text: We've had the same team every week for over a year. They know our centre, they know our standards, and I don't have to think about it anymore. That's exactly what we needed.

metaTitle: Childcare Centre Cleaning Case Study | Your Office Space Newcastle
metaDescription: How Your Office Space delivered consistent, child-safe commercial cleaning for a Hunter Valley childcare centre after 3 failed contractors in 18 months.
